meta.title: Profile & preferences | Console
meta.description: Account info and default model preferences.

chatModel.label: Chat model
chatModel.hint: Account default for new chats. Register models in Model management first; chat and vector models can differ or reuse the same entry.

vectorModel.label: Embedding model
vectorModel.hint: Used for knowledge retrieval and document embeddings. Register in Model management first.

topK.label: Retrieval topK
topK.hint: Max hits per knowledge search. Leave blank for default.

threshold.label: Retrieval threshold
threshold.hint: Score threshold 0–1. Leave blank for default.

chunkSize.label: Chunk size
chunkSize.hint: Vectorization chunk length. Leave blank for default.

chunkOverlap.label: Chunk overlap
chunkOverlap.hint: Vectorization overlap. Leave blank for default.

alert.chatModelStale: Previous default chat model is no longer valid. Please select again.
alert.vectorModelStale: Previous default embedding model is no longer valid. Please select again.

empty.noModels: No models registered yet. Add a model configuration in Model management first.

tooltip.prefEditDisabled: Add at least one model in Model management first.
